items: Loads with no console errors
Reaches gameplay in ≤1 input from load
Core loop reachable and completes one full cycle
Restart/retry works
Audio plays, mute works
No crash, no stuck states, no infinite loading
Played with zero prior context / instructions
No "wait, what do I do?" moments (or noted below if any)
Every action attempted was handled gracefully
Always clear: what to do now / what I just did / what's next
Every menu screen: every control does what its label says
Every input method reaches every action (keyboard/touch/controller)
Every currency/progression system: earn it, spend it, see it update
Every save/load path: close and reopen, state survives correctly
Edge states checked: 0 of something, max of something, first vs Nth time
Checked at min and max supported resolution/aspect ratio
Played 3–5 full sessions back to back
No unfair difficulty spikes found (or noted below)
No boring/repetitive stretch found (or noted below)
Would play a 4th/5th run — yes/no + why (note below)
Rated 1-5: fun / fair / clear / would-recommend (note below)
Re-ran the platform's own requirements checklist top to bottom
Tested on actual target device classes, not just desktop
Tested failure paths: adblock on, slow network, background tab, orientation change
Re-tested everything touching the same system as the latest fix
Re-ran the smoke test (Pass 1) in full
Re-tested every caller of any shared/adapter code that changed

0:0.note: node --check on master + both regenerated alt builds; bot suite 12/12 wins, zero console errors

0:2.note: Combat rebalance: normal/fast/spear enemies now take 2+ hits, wide screen-clearing throw gated behind combo≥4 (FINISH_AT). Loop completes.

5:1.note: Verified via direct function calls in preview (hp decrement/stagger/lethal/empowered paths, brute shove-chain unaffected)

bugs.title: Counter-throw was OP — real fighting was skippable
bugs.repro:
1. Counter early and often
2. Watch crowds clear instantly
bugs.actual: Every counter auto-cleared neighbors — FIXED (gate the wide throw/SWEEP/STRIKE behind combo≥4; below that a kill fells one enemy). Enemy density cut ~30-40%.

debrief.q2: Mike playtest should sanity-check feel/difficulty before QA.

4:0.note: Second CG-guidelines audit — turned the same methodology on JF-#036's own fixes

5:0.note: 12 more fixes; node --check on master + both alt builds; bot suite 11/12 wins, zero console errors

5:2.note: Confirmed live: zero SDK-throttle console errors (a compressed bot run had produced 56 before the debounce fix)

bugs.title: Shared SDK debounce silently ate happytime() on every win
bugs.repro: 1. Win a district (gameplayStop + happytime fire same tick)
bugs.actual: Shared gate treated happytime as a repeat of stop — FIXED (independent gpLast.start/stop/happy)

bugs.title: GM/GD alt-build stubs used old ad-callback signature
bugs.repro:
1. Build for GameMonetize/GameDistribution
2. Trigger first ad
bugs.actual: startRun waits on a callback the stub never called → soft-locked menu. FIXED (stubs accept + invoke cb)

bugs.title: First interstitial could fire on run #2
bugs.repro:
1. Start a session
2. Finish run 1, start run 2
bugs.expected: No ad before a real 3-min wait
bugs.actual: adT started at 0 so cooldown was already satisfied — FIXED (adT = session load time)

bugs.title: Mute button clickable while hidden under pause overlay
bugs.actual: Silently toggled mute — FIXED (draw mute after overlay)

debrief.q2: Several of these were regressions introduced by JF-#036 — the audit turned on its own prior fixes.

4:0.note: First CG-guidelines audit — ran GAME_BIBLE Part 1/4 checklist against the code

4:2.note: Portrait mobile was a bare 375x211 letterboxed strip (74% black bars) with no rotate prompt — FIXED this batch

5:0.note: 12 fixes applied; bot suite re-run 10/12 wins (duck:jump hit ratio improved ~5:1 → 2:1)

bugs.title: Ad request fired in same tick as gameplayStart()
bugs.repro:
1. Finish run
2. Start next run when ad due
bugs.actual: SDK saw gameplay "active" during an in-flight ad — FIXED (split startRun/beginRun, interstitial callback-gated)

bugs.title: No rotate prompt on portrait mobile
bugs.actual: Tiny letterboxed strip, no explanation — FIXED (portraitBlock + auto-pause + rotate screen)

bugs.title: Duck dodge window shorter than jump
bugs.actual: ~19% shorter; bot hits skewed to high-windup throws — FIXED (DUCK_DUR→30)

0:0.note: 600-frame all-silly smoke (every joke scroll + cosmetic + Butcher boss): no throw/error

0:2.note: Loop completes with all 10 "make it sillier" gags active

3:1.note: bot fairness ?bot=3&react=12 = 12/12 wins, 7 hits all dodgeable throws, 0% unreactable, 0% pincer

debrief.q4: 10 gags all built on existing systems (chatter, gag props, reactive moon, longest-yeet, joke scrolls, cosmetics, bowling STRIKE, hype announcer, boss personalities, cameo).

0:5.note: startRun clears darts + resets jump/duck + grounds player — no stuck state

2:0.note: FULL TEST BATTERY (headless, 17/17 pass): dodge windows generous, wrong-height correctly fails, 52f telegraph + 18-32f reaction budget (>> human ~12-15f), attack timing (counter/perfect/whiff), spacing constants sane

3:1.note: BOT FAIRNESS re-run (?bot=3&react=12): 12/12 wins, 3 hits (all dodgeable darts), 0% unreactable, 0% pincer

bugs.title: Duck pose read as "short", not "crouching"
bugs.repro:
1. Duck during a fight (down/S)
2. Observe player silhouette
bugs.actual: Uniform squash only read as "short" — FIXED in this batch: rebuilt with explicit horse-stance pose + torsoDrop + ground shadow, verified via canvas-crop render

0:2.note: Duck/jump dodge axis + spearman throws added; loop still completes

3:1.note: FAIRNESS (?bot=3&react=12): 11/12 wins (was 12/12), avg wave 4.8, 14 hits (13 darts + 1 melee), 0% unreactable, 7% pincer. Harder + still fair.

3:0.note: One legit Rooftop w3 loss (the spear district) — intended difficulty, not a bug

debrief.q4: Difficulty bump per Mike "campaign too easy": dBase 1/3/5/7/9, boss hp 3/4/5/5/6.

0:2.note: Bot fairness suite (?bot=3&react=12, ~200ms reaction): 12/12 wins, avg wave 5.0

0:5.note: Zero hits taken across 12 runs; no livelock after bot fixes (no longer pokes brutes/bosses, waits on body-block, dismisses S_END)

3:1.note: No unreactable telegraphs at normal reaction speed. Stress ?bot=2&react=18 (300ms): 8/8 wins, 4 hits all intended (late vipers 267ms floor + 1 allowed late pincer diff>6)

debrief.q4: Perfect-play bot wins 20/20 — difficulty leans gentle at optimal play; viper floor is 16f (267ms) if late-game ever feels cheap.
